name: memoryai-coding-guard
description: Anti-sloppy enforcement hooks. Block dangerous ops, force verify before done.

PreToolUse.description: Block rm -rf, git push --force, --no-verify, DROP TABLE without explicit confirm.

PostToolUse.description: After edits: detect project type, run lint/typecheck on changed files. Re-inject errors.

Stop.description: Block 'task done' if code touched but verify (build/test) never ran green this session.
